mapper.select:
SELECT a.RESTDE_NO, a.RESTDE_DE, a.RESTDE_NM, a.RESTDE_DC, a.RESTDE_SE_CODE, b.CODE_NM as RESTDE_SE FROM TB_RESTDE a LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CODE, CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM017' AND USE_AT = 'Y') b ON a.RESTDE_SE_CODE = b.CODE WHERE 1=1
AND a.RESTDE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND a.RESTDE_DE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY a.RESTDE_DE DESC, a.RESTDE_NO DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(a.RESTDE_NO) FROM TB_RESTDE a WHERE 1=1
AND a.RESTDE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND a.RESTDE_DE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT a.RESTDE_NO, a.RESTDE_DE, a.RESTDE_NM, a.RESTDE_DC, a.RESTDE_SE_CODE, b.CODE_NM as RESTDE_SE, a.FRST_REGISTER_ID, a.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM TB_RESTDE a LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CODE, CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM017' AND USE_AT = 'Y') b ON a.RESTDE_SE_CODE = b.CODE WHERE a.RESTDE_NO = #{restdeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_RESTDE (RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(RESTDE_NO), 0) + 1 FROM TB_RESTDE), #{restdeDe}, #{restdeNm}, #{restdeDc}, #{restdeSeCode}, #{frstRegisterId}, SYSDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_RESTDE SET RESTDE_DE = #{restdeDe}, RESTDE_NM = #{restdeNm}, RESTDE_DC = #{restdeDc}, RESTDE_SE_CODE = #{restdeSeCode}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = SYSDATE() WHERE RESTDE_NO = #{restdeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) as YEAR, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) as MONTH, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 7, 2) as DAY FROM TB_RESTDE WHERE SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) = LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0') AND SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) = LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') ORDER BY RESTDE_DE

SELECT RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) as YEAR, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) as MONTH, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 7, 2) as DAY FROM TB_RESTDE WHERE SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) = LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0') AND SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) = LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') ORDER BY RESTDE_DE

SELECT RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) as YEAR, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) as MONTH, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 7, 2) as DAY FROM TB_RESTDE WHERE RESTDE_DE = CONCAT(LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0'), LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'), LPAD(#{day}, 2, '0')) ORDER BY RESTDE_DE

SELECT RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) as YEAR, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) as MONTH, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 7, 2) as DAY FROM TB_RESTDE WHERE RESTDE_DE = CONCAT(LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0'), LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'), LPAD(#{day}, 2, '0')) ORDER BY RESTDE_DE

SELECT RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) as YEAR, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) as MONTH, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 7, 2) as DAY FROM TB_RESTDE WHERE SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) = LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0') AND SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) = LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') ORDER BY RESTDE_DE

SELECT RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) as YEAR, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) as MONTH, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 7, 2) as DAY FROM TB_RESTDE WHERE RESTDE_DE = CONCAT(LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0'), LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'), LPAD(#{day}, 2, '0')) ORDER BY RESTDE_DE

SELECT RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) as YEAR, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) as MONTH, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 7, 2) as DAY FROM TB_RESTDE WHERE RESTDE_DE = CONCAT(LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0'), LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'), LPAD(#{day}, 2, '0')) ORDER BY RESTDE_DE

SELECT RESTDE_NO, RESTDE_DE, RESTDE_NM, RESTDE_DC, RESTDE_SE_CODE, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) as YEAR, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) as MONTH, SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 7, 2) as DAY FROM TB_RESTDE WHERE SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 1, 4) = LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0') AND SUBSTRING(RESTDE_DE, 5, 2) = LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') ORDER BY RESTDE_DE
